title: NightVisionToggle
description: With this mod you can switch night vision on and off, and see in all the caves you need!
body:
**NightVisionToggle**
---

With this mod you can switch night vision on and off, and see in all the caves you need! You can toggle the night vision by pressing F8 or key map it to a key that you prefer.

![NightVisionTogglePicture1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/918wEDpP/images/1fe4bf8e391ee4b5fda62ebce57bf700644f58c9.png)
---
---
![NightVisionTogglePicture2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/918wEDpP/images/d819c3c1cda65fa8682ad314cd81194b3daa3f22.png)
---
---
Also Wroks with shaders!



![NightVisionTogglePicture3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/918wEDpP/images/806a8cc66d6e97c50df2fe9c6c5be98ca2da30da.png)
